## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX to discuss progress, issues, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeing 55% increase in organic clicks over past 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Exec developing call scoring feature to connect talent development lifecycle](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [New Exec feature allows uploading presentations into roleplays, with screen sharing coming soon](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
  - [GrowthX planning competitor comparison pages and authority content on building AI roleplays](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Progress Update

  - [55% increase in organic clicks over past 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - ["30 roleplay scenarios" now top-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Seeing referrals from various LLMs, including Claude](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [LearnPage driving significant traffic, reason unclear](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [SEMrush shows increase in SERP feature keywords](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Internal server errors on some pages, likely related to caching and code bundling](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Sean to have team investigate and fix errors](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Discussion of need for more code splitting to improve performance](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)

### Competitor Analysis and Content Strategy

  - [Analyzing Pitch Monster's rankings, appear to be competing for similar keywords](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Planning comparison pages for AI roleplay platforms (e.g. Exec vs. Utile, Second Nature, Hyperbound)](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=779.0)
  - [Developing authority content on how to build AI roleplays](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [Elvis creating database of roleplay creation factors to use in content](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

### Exec Product Updates

  - [Developing call scoring feature to integrate with various call recording platforms](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [New feature allows uploading presentations into roleplays](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1714.0)
  - [Screen sharing capability in development](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Aiming for MVP of call scoring in a couple weeks, full rollout in a couple months](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

### Content Collaboration Opportunities

  - [Potential for GrowthX to create content around Exec's new call scoring feature](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
  - [Discussing ideas for sales-focused content (e.g. "How to sell insurance")](https://fathom.video/share/dpraNuyji_c3kR8wmkPWyQxqysq9oGzF?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
